caption: The video captures a group of individuals, likely a sports team, walking through a glass-enclosed jet bridge at Barajas Airport at 11:15. They are dressed uniformly in white polo shirts and dark pants, with some carrying backpacks. Most of them are wearing face masks, indicating adherence to health protocols. The individuals appear to be heading towards or away from an aircraft, as suggested by their purposeful strides and the airport setting. The sunlight streaming through the glass panels creates a bright and clear atmosphere, highlighting the modern architecture of the jet bridge. The video conveys a sense of movement and anticipation, possibly as the team prepares for travel or arrival.
